qa_pairs.question: How do I initiate a Nibi JupyterLab session using the Open OnDemand portal?
qa_pairs.answer: After logging into the Nibi Open OnDemand portal, click “Compute Node” from the top menu and then select “Nibi JupyterLab.” This action will open a page with a form where you can request a new session.

qa_pairs.question: What steps are involved after completing the form to request a Nibi JupyterLab session?
qa_pairs.answer: After completing the form with your requirement details, you must click “Launch” to submit your request for a Nibi JupyterLab session.

qa_pairs.question: How can I connect to my JupyterLab session once it's been launched?
qa_pairs.answer: Once the status of your requested Nibi JupyterLab session changes to “Running,” you can click “Connect to Jupyter” to open JupyterLab in your web browser.
